posts.content: ComfyUI-See-through: A ComfyUI plugin that wraps [See-through](https://github.com/shitagaki-lab/see-through) — an AI system that decomposes a single anime illustration into manipulatable 2.5D layer-decomposed models with depth ordering, ready for Live2D workflows.

ai.title: ComfyUI-See-through plugin: anime illustration → 2.5D layer-decomposed models for Live2D
ai.summary: A ComfyUI plugin wrapping the See-through AI system that decomposes a single anime illustration into manipulatable 2.5D layer-decomposed models with proper depth ordering. The output is specifically formatted for Live2D animation workflows.
ai.why_important: Bridges the gap between static anime illustrations and rigged 2D animation by automating layer separation and depth assignment.
ai.learnings: Integration of AI-driven layer decomposition into node-based ComfyUI workflows enables direct pipeline from 2D art to Live2D-ready assets.

posts.content: LichtFeld-Studio: Train, inspect, edit, automate, and export 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes from a single native application.

ai.title: LichtFeld-Studio: Train, inspect, edit, automate, and export 3D Gaussian Splatting scenes
ai.summary: A native desktop application providing end-to-end pipeline for 3D Gaussian Splatting workflows: training models from captures, inspecting results, editing scenes, automating repetitive tasks, and exporting final assets. All functionality integrated into a single application interface.
ai.why_important: Consolidates the typically fragmented 3DGS workflow into one tool, reducing context-switching and technical barriers for creatives working with volumetric capture.
ai.learnings: Native application approach to 3DGS provides integrated training, editing, and export capabilities that streamline the production pipeline from capture to final deliverable.

posts.content: StableGen: Transform your 3D texturing workflow with the power of generative AI, directly within Blender!

ai.title: StableGen: Generative AI texturing directly within Blender
ai.summary: A Blender plugin that integrates generative AI directly into 3D texturing workflows, allowing artists to generate textures without leaving the 3D environment. Leverages Stable Diffusion-based models for in-context texture creation on 3D models.
ai.why_important: Eliminates the export-generate-reimport cycle for AI texturing by bringing generative capabilities directly into the primary 3D workspace.
ai.learnings: Direct Blender integration of generative AI texturing tools reduces friction and enables faster iteration by keeping artists in their native 3D environment.
